name: Extend
description: Document AI platform with specialized vision models for parsing, extraction, splitting and workflow orchestration.

seo.title: Extend — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Extend: Document AI platform with specialized vision models for parsing, extraction, splitting and workflow orchestration.

when_to_use: Extracting structured fields from unstructured documents via AI
Automating invoice and receipt parsing for accounting workflows
Building document understanding pipelines for compliance teams
Processing medical or legal documents with AI field extraction

pros: Vision models tuned for document parsing
Better accuracy than generic LLMs on forms
cons: Per-page pricing adds up on high volume
review.verdict: Strong pick when docs are messy and LLM-only extraction keeps failing.
review.best_for: Ops teams parsing invoices, contracts, and claims with workflow logic
review.not_for: Simple text extraction — Unstructured.io or raw LLM may suffice
